steps.name: create-branch
steps.description: Create task/t0013_resolve_morphology_provenance branch and worktree from main.

steps.name: init-folders
steps.description: Create mandatory task folder structure including assets/paper/ and corrections/.

steps.name: research-papers
steps.description: Skipped: the two Feller-lab papers to validate are not in the corpus and will be downloaded by this task; no prior-corpus paper review applies.

steps.name: research-internet
steps.description: Skipped: the only external evidence needed is the content of the two candidate papers themselves, which /add-paper fetches during implementation. No separate internet reconnaissance is required.

steps.name: research-code
steps.description: Review t0005_download_dsgc_morphology to understand dsgc-baseline-morphology asset structure and the source_paper_id field being corrected.

steps.name: planning
steps.description: Plan the two /add-paper invocations and the correction asset that updates dsgc-baseline-morphology.source_paper_id.

steps.name: setup-machines
steps.description: Skipped: local-only task; no remote compute required.

steps.name: implementation
steps.description: Run /add-paper twice (Morrie & Feller 2018 Neuron, Murphy-Baum & Feller 2018 Current Biology), read Methods sections, write correction asset dataset_dsgc-baseline-morphology.json.

steps.name: teardown
steps.description: Skipped: no remote machines were used.

steps.name: creative-thinking
steps.description: Skipped: mechanical provenance-resolution task with a narrow decision procedure; no alternative-approach analysis applies.

steps.name: results
steps.description: Write results_summary.md, results_detailed.md (with full provenance reasoning), metrics.json, costs.json, remote_machines_used.json.

steps.name: compare-literature
steps.description: Skipped: this task produces no quantitative performance metrics to compare against published baselines.

steps.name: suggestions
steps.description: Generate follow-up suggestions from any unresolved provenance ambiguity or downstream corrections.

steps.name: reporting
steps.description: Run all verificators, capture sessions, flip task.json status to completed.
